## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No repository names, URLs, or file paths
- [ ] No GitHub usernames (except contributor field)
- [ ] No proprietary code, algorithms, or data
- [ ] No issue/PR numbers, commit SHAs, or branch names
- [ ] All examples use generic placeholder names
- [ ] No dataset names, column names, or data file paths
- [ ] No email addresses or personal names

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Each entry is reusable beyond one specific project
- [ ] Each entry is non-trivial (requires expertise)
- [ ] Each entry is technically correct (validated in workflow)
- [ ] No duplicates of existing brain entries
